style_description: Casual style, very brief, modern, conversational and fast. Likes to start with news highlights or interesting details about the prospect's company. Often starts with 'Hi [Name],' and ends with 'Thanks,' or 'Talk soon, Kevin'.

past_emails.subject: Congrats on Shield Tech's Series C! 🚀
past_emails.body:
Hi Steve,

I just saw the news about Shield Tech securing $50M in Series C funding. Big congratulations! That's awesome.

When scaling this fast, security systems can take a heavy load. We build AI Agents that help reduce backend stress and handle false positive alerts a lot better.

Do you have 10 minutes for a quick chat this week? Let me know what day works best!

Thanks,
Kevin

past_emails.subject: Loved TechCorp's new app! Quick question on traffic management
past_emails.body:
Hi Alice,

I tried out TechCorp's new Workflow Automation feature and it looks amazing. I really love the UI!

I noticed your user base is growing super fast. Are you facing any customer queue build-ups or slow backend response times? We recently helped a similar system improve request handling speed by 35% and thought it might be helpful.

If you're open to a casual chat, are you free next Tuesday afternoon?

Talk soon,
Kevin

past_emails.subject: Apex Finance's new digital asset portfolio & system stability
past_emails.body:
Hi Evan,

I've been following the news about Apex Finance's digital asset transactions growing by 40%. Fantastic milestone!

With traffic growing this fast, I imagine your compliance and IT security teams are kept quite busy. We built an AI assistant that automates compliance checks, saving IT teams about half their time.

Are you free for a quick 15-minute call this Thursday at 2 PM? Would love to share some ideas.

Talk soon,
Kevin
